purpose: Reuse-first index. Read this before opening any component source. 60 source components.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Represents a user or entity via image, initials or icon fallback, with optional status.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact status/label indicator. Non-interactive.

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary interactive control. Fully token-driven across five visual types and six tones, with loading and icon affordances.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Binary (and indeterminate) selection control with an optional label.

components.name: Chip
components.description: Interactive, selectable/removable token for filters and multi-select input.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Visual or semantic separator between content, with an optional inline label.

components.name: Icon
components.description: Reusable SVG icon system rendered on a 24×24 grid with `currentColor`. Supports size, color, stroke width and filled/stroke modes.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Square, icon-only action. Requires an accessible label.

components.name: Image
components.description: Responsive image with aspect-ratio, object-fit, loading skeleton and error fallback.

components.name: Input
components.description: Single-line text field with three visual types, adornment slots and the full validation-state matrix.

components.name: Label
components.description: Form field label with required/optional and disabled affordances.

components.name: Link
components.description: Navigational text link with tone and underline options; supports external affordance.

components.name: Progress
components.description: Linear progress indicator supporting determinate and indeterminate modes.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Single-choice selection control, grouped by shared `name`.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder that mimics the shape of content while it loads. Text, circle and rectangle shapes with an optional shimmer animation.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Single-value range slider built on a native <input type="range"> for full keyboard and accessibility support, styled across sizes and tones with a live value readout.

components.name: SocialLoginButton
components.description: OAuth continue-with button. One brand-locked variant per provider (Kakao, Naver, Apple, Google, Facebook, email) — each carries its official palette and logo mark. Supports a full-width label form and a compact circular icon-only form.

components.name: Sparkline
components.description: Compact, axis-less trend chart sized to sit inline with text or in a stat tile. Token-driven SVG. Type A: line (with optional emphasized endpoint) · Type B: bars.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Indeterminate loading indicator driven by Motion tokens.

components.name: Switch
components.description: On/off toggle for immediate settings changes.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Static, optionally-dismissable keyword label for categorisation.

components.name: Text
components.description: Typography primitive. Every visual style maps to a Text Style token, so React text and Figma Text Styles stay in lockstep.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text field sharing the Input visual language and state matrix.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Contextual label revealed on hover/focus of a trigger, with a Motion-token entrance.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Compound disclosure list (Accordion, Accordion.Item, Accordion.Trigger, Accordion.Content) with single/multiple modes and animated expansion.

components.name: Autocomplete
components.description: Free-text field with live suggestions. Unlike Combobox the typed value is preserved even without a selection — suitable for search boxes and async lookups (loading state included).

components.name: BarChart
components.description: Categorical magnitude chart. Token-driven SVG bars anchored to the baseline with direct value labels (relief for the palette’s low-contrast hues). Type A: vertical columns · Type B: horizontal bars.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical navigation trail with configurable separators and overflow collapsing.

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container with a compound API (Card, Card.Header, Card.Body, Card.Footer, Card.Media). Card.Header covers the standalone header pattern.

components.name: Combobox
components.description: Single-select with type-to-filter. Composes the Input field with a filtered listbox popup and full keyboard navigation (ARIA combobox pattern).

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Single-date field with a calendar popup. Composes the Input with a month grid — pick by click or type an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Min/max bounds disable out-of-range days.

components.name: DonutChart
components.description: Part-to-whole chart. Token-driven SVG segments with a 2px surface gap between slices, a legend carrying direct value/percent labels, and an optional center total. Type A: donut · Type B: pie.

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Menu surface anchored to a trigger, with keyboard navigation and outside-click dismissal.

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Placeholder shown when there is no data, no results or an error — an icon, a title, a supporting message and an optional primary action.

components.name: FileUpload
components.description: Drag-and-drop file input with click-to-browse, accept/size/count validation and a removable file list. Single or multiple files.

components.name: FormField
components.description: Composes Label + control + hint/error text and wires the accessibility relationships (id, aria-describedby, aria-invalid).

components.name: Gauge
components.description: Single-value radial gauge. A recessive track arc with a token-driven value arc filled to the value ratio, plus a large tabular value read-out and label. Type A: 180° semicircle · Type B: 270° arc.

components.name: Heatmap
components.description: Matrix magnitude chart. A single-hue sequential ramp encodes each cell value (light = low → dark = high) over `var(--chart-1)`, with row/column labels, a hover tooltip and a low→high scale legend. Type A: square cells · Type B: value labels shown in cells.

components.name: ImageUpload
components.description: Image-specific uploader: drag-and-drop or browse, with a thumbnail preview grid and per-image remove. Defaults to accepting images and rendering object-URL previews.

components.name: LineChart
components.description: Change-over-time chart. Token-driven SVG with one axis, recessive gridlines, a legend for multiple series and direct end-labels. Type A: lines · Type B: filled area.

components.name: ListItem
components.description: Row with leading media, title/description text and trailing content; optionally interactive/selectable.

components.name: Menu
components.description: Composable action menu: a trigger plus freely-arranged MenuItem / MenuLabel / MenuSeparator children, with roving-focus keyboard navigation, icons and shortcut hints. Use over Dropdown when items need grouping, labels or custom content.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page navigation with previous/next controls and truncated page ranges.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Anchored overlay that floats arbitrary content next to a trigger. Positioned on a side × align grid with an optional arrow — the base primitive for Menu, Combobox, Autocomplete and DatePicker.

components.name: RadarChart
components.description: Multivariate comparison chart. Token-driven SVG polar grid with one axis per variable, recessive concentric gridlines and a legend for multiple series. Type A: filled polygons · Type B: line-only outlines.

components.name: ScatterChart
components.description: Correlation chart plotting (x, y) points on two numeric axes. Token-driven SVG with recessive gridlines, per-point hover tooltip and a legend for multiple series. Type A: points · Type B: points + linear (least-squares) trend line.

components.name: SearchInput
components.description: Search field composing Input with a leading search icon, clear affordance and submit-on-Enter.

components.name: Select
components.description: Accessible single-select built on a native <select> styled to match the Input language.

components.name: SocialLogin
components.description: OAuth sign-in block. Two layout presets: Type A — full-width labelled buttons stacked with a divider and a secondary icon row; Type B — a compact centered grid of circular provider marks.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Compound tabbed navigation (Tabs, Tabs.List, Tabs.Tab, Tabs.Panel) with roving-tabindex keyboard support.

components.name: TextField
components.description: Label + Input composed into a ready-to-use field. Three purpose-built layouts: Type A (stacked label), Type B (floating label), Type C (inline label). Wires the accessibility relationships automatically.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Contextual message with tone-driven icon, optional title, action and dismissal. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — inline, B — full-width banner, C — prominent (left accent bar).

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Edge-anchored panel (portal + focus trap) that slides in from any side.

components.name: Footer
components.description: Site footer. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — multi-column links + bottom bar, B — simple centered brand + social, C — minimal single row.

components.name: Header
components.description: Application top bar with brand, primary navigation and action slots. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — standard (brand · nav · actions), B — centered brand with nav below, C — compact (nav hidden).

components.name: Modal
components.description: Accessible dialog rendered in a portal with focus trapping, scroll lock and scrim dismissal.

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Declarative navigation bar: pass a list of links and it renders them with active-state handling (aria-current), an alignment axis and a responsive collapse into a mobile panel. Slot-based Header is the alternative when you need a custom layout.

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: Vertical navigation rail with a compound API (Sidebar, Sidebar.Section, Sidebar.Item) and a collapsed icon-only mode.

components.name: Table
components.description: Data grid with column config, density, striping/bordering, sticky header, sortable columns, row selection and a loading state.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Transient notification managed by ToastProvider/useToast, with tone, action and auto-dismiss.
